description_long: This bird features a slender, elongated body with long, narrow wings that stretch widely to either side, giving it an impressive wingspan. Its plumage is primarily gray with subtle gradients and darker accents on the wings and tail, while the head is adorned with a distinctive crest of pointed feathers. The beak is long, straight, and orange, contrasting sharply with the rest of the body. The legs are thin and elongated, colored in a reddish hue, ending in three forward-facing toes and one backward-facing toe, all tipped with sharp claws. The tail is long and pointed, with feathers that taper to fine tips. Overall, the bird has a streamlined, agile appearance, suggesting it is adapted for flight and possibly wading.
description: A slender, gray bird with a long orange beak, pointed crest, and wide, narrow wings. It has long reddish legs and a sharply pointed tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bird's outstretched wings, pointed crest, and straight orange beak.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bird's elongated body, long legs, and the profile of its beak and crest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pointed tail feathers and the symmetry of the wings and legs.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the tail's taper and the layered structure of the wings and crest.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid gray with darker wing tips and a white face; subtle gradients on body and wings
